page_metadata.biotools__summary: fastv is a computational toolset for rapid identification of SARS-CoV-2, other viruses, and microorganisms from sequencing data. This tool supports both short reads (Illumina, BGI, etc.) and long reads (ONT, PacBio, etc.).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: fastv is a computational toolset for rapid identification of SARS-CoV-2, other viruses, and microorganisms from sequencing data. This tool supports both short reads (Illumina, BGI, etc.) and long reads (ONT, PacBio, etc.).
